Card Title: BE-001 - Backend framework, environments, and project baseline
Description: Confirm framework and module structure. Add health endpoint, env config, request logging, validation, error middleware, and setup README. Acceptance: backend boots locally and Michael can run it.

Card Title: BE-002 - PostgreSQL and Prisma schema v1
Description: Create the internal CRM schema draft. Add account-scoped base columns, indexes, db.sql, and demo seed. Acceptance: fresh database import and seed run cleanly.

Card Title: BE-003 - Event model and logging standard
Description: Create shared events table and event logging service for leads, calls, consults, revenue, insights, and audits. Acceptance: all events include clinic scope and structured payload.

Card Title: BE-004 - Auth endpoints and session model
Description: Build register, login, logout, and me endpoints. Add session expiry and consistent auth errors. Acceptance: user can register/login and frontend receives session data.

Card Title: BE-005 - Clinics, user memberships, roles, and invites
Description: Build clinics, memberships, invites, role changes, and removals. Acceptance: owner can invite team and users only see their clinics.

Card Title: BE-006 - Tenant middleware and permission middleware
Description: Resolve active clinic per request, reject cross-clinic access, enforce permissions, add super admin rules. Acceptance: cross-clinic access fails closed.

Card Title: BE-007 - Audit log service
Description: Create audit logs for role changes, invites, removals, clinic setting changes, and security actions. Acceptance: clinic-scoped audit feed works.

Card Title: BE-008 - Onboarding status and partial-save endpoints
Description: Build onboarding status and save endpoints. Return completion percentage and validate required fields. Acceptance: onboarding can be resumed and completed.

Card Title: BE-009 - Staff and practitioner profiles
Description: Build staff/practitioner models and CRUD. Link to users where relevant. Acceptance: practitioners are selectable for consults and reporting.

Card Title: BE-010 - Treatment categories and treatments API
Description: Seed standard treatment categories and build treatment CRUD with price, margin, priority, and high-ticket fields. Acceptance: treatments drive revenue estimates.

Card Title: BE-011 - Default clinic setup automation
Description: Create default pipeline stages, call outcomes, consult outcomes, SLA settings, and reputation settings after onboarding. Acceptance: new clinic is usable immediately.

Card Title: BE-012 - Lead CRUD, filters, and search
Description: Build lead model and CRUD with filters, search, pagination, and tenant isolation. Acceptance: manual leads appear in inbox and filters are fast.

Card Title: BE-013 - Lead notes, tags, timeline, and events
Description: Build notes, tags, assignment changes, and combined timeline from notes/events. Acceptance: lead detail drawer has accurate activity.

Card Title: BE-014 - Website form webhook and UTM capture
Description: Build website form webhook with source, campaign, UTM, gclid, and fbclid capture. Acceptance: webhook creates lead in correct clinic.

Card Title: BE-015 - Lead duplicate detection and CSV export
Description: Detect duplicates by phone/email and export filtered leads CSV. Acceptance: duplicates are identified and exports are tenant-safe.

Card Title: BE-016 - Pipeline stages and stage movement
Description: Build pipeline stages, stage transitions, stage history, required fields, lost reason, and pipeline metrics. Acceptance: stage movement writes events.

Card Title: BE-017 - SLA engine and breach detection
Description: Set SLA deadline on lead creation, record first response, run breach job, return response metrics and estimated revenue risk. Acceptance: breaches are detected.

Card Title: BE-018 - Twilio tracking number and inbound call webhooks
Description: Set up Twilio call webhooks, tracking numbers, call metadata, recording metadata, and retry-safe handling. Acceptance: test call creates call record.

Card Title: BE-019 - Call list, details, notes, tags, and outcomes
Description: Build calls list/detail, filters, notes, outcomes, missed flag, staff attribution, and call metrics. Acceptance: calls can be tagged and conversion metrics work.

Card Title: BE-020 - Call-to-lead matching and missed call recovery
Description: Normalize numbers, match calls to leads or create leads, mark missed calls, and write events. Acceptance: unknown caller creates lead.

Card Title: BE-021 - AI call analysis job
Description: Build structured AI call analysis from transcript/manual transcript with regeneration and correction. Acceptance: output matches documented JSON and is advisory.

Card Title: BE-022 - Consult CRUD and outcome logging
Description: Build consult CRUD, practitioner assignment, treatment interest, attendance, outcomes, revenue, deposit, lost reason, and metrics. Acceptance: outcome logging is quick.

Card Title: BE-023 - Treatment plan value light
Description: Track commercial treatment plan value, status, expected/realised revenue, sessions, deposit, accepted/rejected, and drop-off. Acceptance: no clinical EMR fields.

Card Title: BE-024 - Dashboard summary and funnel APIs
Description: Build dashboard summary, funnel, revenue leaks, opportunities, date ranges, and caching. Acceptance: dashboard answers money/leak questions quickly.

Card Title: BE-025 - Revenue by channel, treatment, practitioner, and source
Description: Build breakdown APIs for revenue by channel, treatment, practitioner, and source. Acceptance: owner can identify best/worst areas.

Card Title: BE-026 - Manual ad spend and campaign mapping
Description: Build manual ad spend, channel/campaign mapping, attribution labels, and manual corrections. Acceptance: spend can be entered without Google/Meta APIs.

Card Title: BE-027 - ROAS and campaign metrics
Description: Calculate cost per lead, booked consult, attended consult, sold treatment, and ROAS by channel/campaign. Acceptance: dashboard can show cost per booked consult.

Card Title: BE-028 - AI insight generation job and prompt logs
Description: Generate 3-5 metric-backed insights with structured prompts and prompt logs. Acceptance: insights cite metrics and recommend action.

Card Title: BE-029 - Insight actions, assignment, archive, and history
Description: Build complete/archive/assign endpoints and insight history. Acceptance: insight recommendations can become tracked actions.

Card Title: BE-030 - Benchmarking v1
Description: Build anonymised benchmark snapshots, percentile calculation, top quartile comparison, thresholds, and gap explanations. Acceptance: insufficient data is labelled.

Card Title: BE-031 - Competitor snapshot light
Description: Build competitor CRUD and AI differentiation/campaign angle generation from structured notes. Acceptance: no heavy scraping; useful strategic notes.

Card Title: BE-032 - Review and reputation basics
Description: Build review link storage, review request tracking, AI reply suggestion, and GBP checklist. Acceptance: compliance-safe reputation basics work.

Card Title: BE-033 - Reports, snapshots, and CSV export
Description: Build report generation, snapshots, report retrieval, and export. Acceptance: monthly executive report snapshot can be generated.

Card Title: BE-034 - Pilot clinic setup, demo data, and backend QA
Description: Create pilot/demo seed data, smoke tests, tenant tests, and release checklist. Acceptance: Max can demo and Michael can onboard.

Card Title: BE-035 - Tenant isolation test suite
Description: Automated tests for read/write/list/export/webhook tenant isolation. Acceptance: cross-clinic access tests pass.

Card Title: BE-036 - Background jobs baseline with Redis/BullMQ
Description: Set up Redis/BullMQ job runner, retries, logs, failed-job visibility, SLA jobs. Acceptance: jobs run locally and on staging.

Card Title: BE-037 - API validation, rate limits, and consistent errors
Description: Standardise validation, errors, sensitive endpoint rate limits, webhook secret validation, and safe logging. Acceptance: frontend can reliably display API errors.
